arcs.title: The Duck Bandit
arcs.summary: The seventh duck's map has been authenticated by Ministry cartographers — it accurately charts a real trail northeast of the Gorge. Steve is preparing the Jeep. Christine has said 'Thursday.' The Jeep started on its own when she said it. The Bandit appears to have been leading them somewhere specific all along; the trail destination and the Bandit's identity are yet to be revealed.

arcs.title: The Briefcase Mystery
arcs.summary: A sealed gold-ribboned envelope appeared from the vending machine, addressed in smug elegant handwriting, and now sits beside the briefcase. The hum has gained a second note — a perfect fifth harmony. A recovered memo from Level Three states 'it was always going to end up with her' and refers to the case's contents as 'the thing.' The Ministry has re-filed the memo behind the radiator. Contents still unknown; resolution drawing close.
